DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT ASHLEY BRUNAMONTI'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFFS RESPONSES TO DEFENDANTS DISCOVERY REQUESTS; REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCES NOR A OPPOSITION FILED THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT' MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFFS TO RESPOND TO DISCOVERY REQUESTS IS UNOPPOSED AND GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: STEVEN B. STEIN; CLERK: YOLANDA MAZARIEGOS; PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (302)

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT ASHLEY BRUNAMONTI'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS IS ARGUED AND GRANTED, FOR REASONS SET FORTH IN DEFENDANT ASHLEY BRUNAMONTI'S MOVING PAPERS. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. THE PREVAILING PARTY SHALL SUBMIT A [PROPOSED] WRITTEN ORDER THAT TRACKS THE COURT'S RULING, VERBATIM AND THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE PRO TEM: KATHERINE HUIBONHOA; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; NOT REPORTED. (D302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-13-2017 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-13-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Gino J. Molinari of the law offices of Gino J. Molinari (415.863.3767) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, Jeanette N. Little of the law offices of Philip M. Andersen & Associates (925.225.6838) appears by telephone as counsel for defendant/moving party

Both sides stipulate to the judge pro tempore. The cause is argued and submitted by both sides in open court.

DEFENDANT ASHLEY BRUNAMONTI'S Motion For Terminating Sanctions is Granted, for reasons set forth in Defendant Ashley Brunamonti's moving papers. No opposition was filed. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim and that complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Huibonhoa; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302/jpt)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Defendants Discovery Requests; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-04-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES IN THE MATTER:

DEFENDANT ASHLEY BRUNAMONTI'S Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Defendants Discovery Requests; Request For Monetary Sanctions is scheduled this day. There being no appearances nor a opposition filed the Court adopts its Tentative Ruling. Defendant' motion to compel plaintiffs to respond to discovery requests is unopposed and granted. Plaintiffs shall respond to the discovery requests within twenty days after service of a copy of this order wit Notice of Entry. Sanctions in the sum of $360 are awarded as against plaintiffs to be paid within the aforesaid twenty days.

Proposed Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven B. Stein; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported (302)
